title: Historical Episode Events Registry
description: Canonical event-marker registry for `history_zoom_{episode_slug}` charts (VIZ-V1). Per VIZ-V12 (owner: Vera; Ray may propose entries via PR, per META-CF), every zoom chart renders its event markers from this registry — no ad-hoc picks. Each key-event row carries a mandatory `rationale` and `source_citation` so a second Vera reruns identically. Any new episode requires registry PR first. Palette / positioning strategy choices live outside this registry (see color_palette_registry and VIZ-V13 annotation strategies).

x-version.description: Semver of the registry instance. Bumped per META-CF on episode add / event add / rationale rewrite.

x-owner.description: Single agent accountable for the registry instance. Must be 'vera' (Ray may propose via PR, Vera merges).

x-generated.description: ISO-8601 date the instance was last regenerated.

notes.description: Freeform top-level notes (e.g. bootstrap rationale, pending Ray dispatches).

episodes.description: Map of episode_slug -> episode definition. Slugs match the canonical set in VIZ-V1 (dotcom, gfc, covid, taper_2018, inflation_2022) and extensions.

episode_slug.description: Echo of the map key, snake_case (e.g., 'dotcom').

start_date.description: Earliest date rendered in the zoom window (ISO-8601 YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: Latest date rendered in the zoom window (ISO-8601 YYYY-MM-DD).

episode_rationale.description: Why this episode is in the registry — i.e., which stakeholder feedback (SL-4 / SL-5), which narrative arc, which reference pair needs it.

episode_source_citation.description: Canonical source for the start/end window (NBER recession dates, Fed timeline, etc.).

key_events.description: Ordered list of 3-5 dated events rendered as vertical dashed markers on the zoom chart.

date.description: Event date (ISO-8601 YYYY-MM-DD). Must fall within the episode's [start_date, end_date] window.

label.description: Short annotation text rendered next to the vertical marker (e.g., 'Mar 2000: Dot-Com peak'). Per VIZ-V1 recommended format '{MMM YYYY}: {event title ≤5 words}'.

rationale.description: Why this date matters in the episode — one-sentence causal or milestone explanation. Mandatory per VIZ-V12.

source_citation.description: Authoritative source for the date/event pair. NBER for recession starts/ends; paper, Fed statement, or news wire for market events. Mandatory per VIZ-V12 — no bare agent discretion.
